---
title: "Numerical Methods"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---
I plan to put together short explanations and animations on various numerical methods and math-related topics here. It will take me a long time to put this together totally. So, please be patient.

This page was inspired by John H Mathew's website [@mathewsSite]. In 2019, the page was taken down. I tried contacting Cal State Fullerton in 2019 but they did not respond. Fastforward to April-2026, I realized I could pull it back from the Internet Archive (The Wayback Machine) at least partially. Therefore, you will notice that this is inspired from his page.

## Function Approximation

### Function Approximation at a Point

- [Taylor Series](taylor-series.qmd)
- [Padé approximant](pade-approximant.qmd)
- [Laurent series](laurent-series.qmd)

### Others

- [Power Series](power-series.qmd)
- [Fourier series](fourier-series.qmd)

## The Solution of Nonlinear Equations f(x) = 0

- [Fixed Point Iteration](fixed-point-iteration.qmd)
- [Bisection Method](bisection-method.qmd)
- [False Position or Regula Falsi Method](false-position-or-regula-falsi-method.qmd)
- [Newton-Raphson Method](newton-raphson-method.qmd)
- [Secant Method](secant-method.qmd)
- [Muller's Method](mullers-method.qmd)
- [Aitken's Method & Steffensen's Acceleration](aitken-method-and-steffensen-acceleration.qmd)
- [Accelerated & Modified Newton-Raphson](accelerated-and-modified-newton-raphson.qmd)
- [Improved Newton Method](improved-newton-method.qmd)
- [Halley's Method](halleys-method.qmd)
- [Horner's Method](horners-method.qmd)
- [Lin-Bairstow Method](lin-bairstow-method.qmd)
- [Brent's Method](brents-method.qmd)
- [Graeffe's Method](graeffes-method.qmd)
- [Nonlinear Systems](nonlinear-systems.qmd)
- [Broyden's Method](broydens-method.qmd)

## The Solution of Linear Systems AX = B

- [Triangular Systems and Back Substitution](triangular-systems-and-back-substitution.qmd)
- [Gauss-Jordan Elimination and Pivoting](gauss-jordan-elimination-and-pivoting.qmd)
- [Tri-Diagonal Matrices](tri-diagonal-matrices.qmd)
- [Inverse Matrix](inverse-matrix.qmd)
- [LU Factorization](lu-factorization.qmd)
- [Cholesky, Doolittle and Crout Factorizations](cholesky-doolittle-and-crout-factorizations.qmd)
- [Jacobi and Gauss-Seidel Iteration](jacobi-and-gauss-seidel-iteration.qmd)
- [Successive Over Relaxation - SOR](successive-over-relaxation-sor.qmd)
- [Pivoting Methods](pivoting-methods.qmd)
- [Iterative Refinement](iterative-refinement.qmd)
- [Row Reduced Echelon Form](row-reduced-echelon-form.qmd)
- [Homogeneous Linear Systems](homogeneous-linear-systems.qmd)
- [Kirchoff's Law](kirchoffs-law.qmd)
- [Leontief Model](leontief-model.qmd)
- [Linear Programming-Simplex Method](linear-programming-simplex-method.qmd)

## Interpolation and Polynomial Approximation

- [Maclaurin and Taylor Series](maclaurin-and-taylor-series.qmd)
- [Lagrange Polynomial Interpolation and Approximation](lagrange-polynomial-interpolation-and-approximation.qmd)
- [Newton Interpolation Polynomial](newton-interpolation-polynomial.qmd)
- [Hermite Polynomial Interpolation](hermite-polynomial-interpolation.qmd)
- [Cubic Splines](cubic-splines.qmd)
- [B-Splines](b-splines.qmd)
- [Bézier Curves](bezier-curves.qmd)
- [Chebyshev Approximation Polynomial](chebyshev-approximation-polynomial.qmd)
- [Pade Approximation](pade-approximation.qmd)
- [Rational Approximation](rational-approximation.qmd)
- [Aitken's and Neville's Interpolation](aitkens-and-nevilles-interpolation.qmd)
- [Legendre Polynomials](legendre-polynomials.qmd)
- [The Tangent Parabola](the-tangent-parabola.qmd)
- [Catenary](catenary.qmd)

## Curve Fitting

- [Least Squares Lines](least-squares-lines.qmd)
- [Least Squares Polynomials](least-squares-polynomials.qmd)
- [Nonlinear Curve Fitting](nonlinear-curve-fitting.qmd)
- [Logistic Curve](logistic-curve.qmd)
- [FFT and Trigonometric Polynomials](fft-and-trigonometric-polynomials.qmd)
- [Conic Fit](conic-fit.qmd)
- [Circle of Curvature](circle-of-curvature.qmd)
- [regularizeNd Series](../regularizeNd/index.qmd)

## Numerical Differentiation

- [Numerical Differentiation](numerical-differentiation.qmd)
- [Richardson Extrapolation](richardson-extrapolation.qmd)
- [Derive Numerical Differentiation Formulae](derive-numerical-differentiation-formulae.qmd)

## Numerical Integration

- [Riemann Sums](riemann-sums.qmd)
- [Midpoint Rule](midpoint-rule.qmd)
- [Newton-Cotes Integration](newton-cotes-integration.qmd)
- [Trapezoidal Rule for Numerical Integration](trapezoidal-rule-for-numerical-integration.qmd)
- [Simpson's Rule for Numerical Integration](simpsons-rule-for-numerical-integration.qmd)
- [Simpson's 3/8 Rule for Numerical Integration](simpsons-3-8-rule-for-numerical-integration.qmd)
- [Boole's Rule](booles-rule.qmd)
- [Romberg Integration](romberg-integration.qmd)
- [Adaptive Simpson's Rule](adaptive-simpsons-rule.qmd)
- [Gauss-Legendre Quadrature](gauss-legendre-quadrature.qmd)
- [Cubic Spline Quadrature](cubic-spline-quadrature.qmd)
- [Monte Carlo Pi](monte-carlo-pi.qmd)
- [Monte Carlo Integration](monte-carlo-integration.qmd)
- [2D Trapezoidal and Simpson Rules](2d-trapezoidal-and-simpson-rules.qmd)

## Solution of Differential Equations

- [Euler's Method for ODE's](eulers-method-for-odes.qmd)
- [Taylor Series Method for ODE's](taylor-series-method-for-odes.qmd)
- [Runge-Kutta Method](runge-kutta-method.qmd)
- [Runge-Kutta-Fehlberg Method](runge-kutta-fehlberg-method.qmd)
- [Adams-Bashforth-Moulton Method](adams-bashforth-moulton-method.qmd)
- [Milne-Simpson's Method](milne-simpsons-method.qmd)
- [Predictor-Corrector Methods](predictor-corrector-methods.qmd)
- [Shooting Methods for ODE's](shooting-methods-for-odes.qmd)
- [Finite Difference Method for ODE's](finite-difference-method-for-odes.qmd)
- [Galerkin's Method](galerkins-method.qmd)
- [Painleve Property](painleve-property.qmd)
- [Lotka-Volterra Model](lotka-volterra-model.qmd)
- [Pendulum](pendulum.qmd)
- [Projectile Motion](projectile-motion.qmd)
- [Lorenz Attractor](lorenz-attractor.qmd)
- [van der Pol System](van-der-pol-system.qmd)
- [Harvesting Model](harvesting-model.qmd)
- [Frobenius Series Solution](frobenius-series-solution.qmd)
- [Picard Iteration](picard-iteration.qmd)
- [Spring-Mass Systems](spring-mass-systems.qmd)

## Solution of Partial Differential Equations

- [Finite Difference Method](finite-difference-method.qmd)
- [Crank-Nicolson Method](crank-nicolson-method.qmd)
- [Elliptic PDE's](elliptic-pdes.qmd)

## Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors

- [Eigenvalues and Eigenvectors](eigenvalues-and-eigenvectors.qmd)
- [Power method](power-method.qmd)
- [Jacobi method](jacobi-method.qmd)
- [Householder Transformations](householder-transformations.qmd)
- [QR method](qr-method.qmd)
- [Compartment Model](compartment-model.qmd)
- [Earthquake Model](earthquake-model.qmd)
- [Matrix Exponential](matrix-exponential.qmd)
- [Faddeev-Leverrier Method](faddeev-leverrier-method.qmd)
- [Hessenberg Factorization](hessenberg-factorization.qmd)

## Numerical Optimization

- [Golden Ratio Search](golden-ratio-search.qmd)
- [Fibonacci Search](fibonacci-search.qmd)
- [Quadratic Interpolative Search](quadratic-interpolative-search.qmd)
- [Nelder Mead Method](nelder-mead-method.qmd)
- [Powell's Method](powells-method.qmd)
- [Steepest Descent - Gradient Search](steepest-descent-gradient-search.qmd)
- [Newton's Search Method](newtons-search-method.qmd)
